title: Topovn's Vanilla+
description: Just another vanilla enhanced modpack for me and my friends. Featuring new biomes, structures, QOLs, animations and better UI.
body:
## Description
Enjoy a better Minecraft 1.20.1 with my personal Vanilla Enhanced modpack. Bundled with extra content, enhanced visuals, subtle quality of life tweaks all while staying true to the vanilla gameplay.

_or at least still vanilla in my definition_ 

## Contents
- New biomes to set foot on from **Biome O'Plenty**, **Region Unexplored**, **Terralith** (and much more) on top of many new structures from **YUNG's**, **Moog's**, **Repurposed Structures**, etc to explore
- Conquer harder contents in all 3 dimensions with **Dungeon & Taverns**, **Incendium**, **Nullscape** and more
  
- Mobs got a makeover:
  - Villagers got **CT's Overhaul Villages**, **Villager Plus**, **Guard Villager** to protect and they now has **(Villager) Names**. 
  - **Mob Captains** has appeared, Illagers can now use **Ships**, **Friends & Foes** are here with **More Mob Variants**
  - Horse are revamped with **Horse Buff**, can be called by **Whistle**-ing like Arthur in RDR2
- Exprience enhanced UI with [**Vanilla Tweaks**](https://vanillatweaks.net/) resource pack, **Advancement Plaques**, **Blur+**, **Held Item Info**, **Item Borders + Highligher**, **Legendary Tooltips**, **Colorful Containers** and more
  - Oiled up the UI with **Chat Animation**, **Smooth Scrolling + Swapping** so everything is smooth like butter

- QOL mods from **Serilum's TVE**, **DB's MC Plus**, and more

- Multiplayer supported with **Essential**, **Simple Voice Chat** and **Talk Bubbles**
- Also comes with shaders: **BSL**, **Complementary**, **Redhat** but for best performance/lower specs use **MakeUp UltraFast**
  
## Credits
**None** of the mods here are made by me, all credits goes to the respective creators

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
